opportunities.title: Allbridge Gets Bridged Again: $1.65M Later, Nobody's Surprised
opportunities.why_now: Another cross-chain bridge exploit hits days after the last one, confirming bridges remain the industry's weakest link.
opportunities.angle: Post-mortem breakdown of the exploit mechanics + a running tally of 2026 bridge hacks, ending with 'we told you so' tone

opportunities.title: Audits Were Always Theater — Institutions Finally Admit It
opportunities.why_now: Hacken's new report shows institutional trust in audits is collapsing just as bridge and DeFi exploits keep piling up.
opportunities.angle: Analysis piece dissecting why point-in-time audits fail against live exploits, framed as vindication for security-first skeptics

opportunities.title: SummerFi Didn't Retire — It Got Exploited to Death
opportunities.why_now: A seven-year-old DeFi protocol is shutting down and citing an exploit as the reason, a rare admission of the real endgame for hacked projects.
opportunities.angle: Obituary-style breakdown of SummerFi's collapse as a case study in how exploits quietly kill protocols long after headlines fade

opportunities.title: Kaspersky Just Mapped the Malware Framework Coming for Your Wallet
opportunities.why_now: A named, structured malware framework specifically targeting crypto investors is a rare concrete IOC drop worth dissecting before it spreads further.
opportunities.angle: Technical explainer on the malware's attack chain with practical wallet-hygiene takeaways, security-nerd bait

opportunities.title: AI Is Writing Exploits Faster Than Your Auditors Can Read Code
opportunities.why_now: A NEAR co-founder is publicly warning that AI-assisted hacking now outpaces manual code review, a structural shift in the threat model.
opportunities.angle: Opinion/analysis on what AI-accelerated exploit discovery means for audit cadence and bug bounty economics going forward
